zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert de Gant 1st Earl of Lincoln於1126年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭時，他的父親Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln46歲，母親Maud de Penthièvre39歲。他於大約1148年與Rohese de Clare在英國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1156年在英國林可爾史爾享年30歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert de Gant 1st Earl of Lincoln于1126年出生在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭时，他的父亲Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln46岁，母亲Maud de Penthièvre39岁。他于大约1148年与Rohese de Clare在英国结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1156年在英国林可爾史爾享年30岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gant
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ghent in Flanders, Belgium.
English: from Middle English gaunt, gant ‘slim, slender; drawn, thin and angular’.
North German: probably a variant of   Gans   ‘goose’.

variants.name: Gans
meanings: from gans ‘goose’, hence a metonymic occupational name for someone who bred or tended geese, or a nickname for someone who wobbled or behaved (foolishly) like a goose, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a goose.
nickname for a healthy or strong person, from Middle Low German gans ‘whole, complete, healthy’.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert de Gant 1st Earl of Lincoln was born in 1126, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln, was 46 and his mother, Maud de Penthièvre, was 39. He married Rohese de Clare about 1148, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1156, in Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 30, and was buried in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert de Gant 1st Earl of Lincoln est né en 1126, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Maud de Penthièvre, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Rohese de Clare environ 1148, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1156, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert de Gant 1st Earl of Lincoln 1126 in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln 46 und seine Mutter Maud de Penthièvre 39. Er hat um 1148 in England Rohese de Clare geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1156 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Gant 1st Earl of Lincoln è nato il nel 1126 nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Penthièvre, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Rohese de Clare circa 1148, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1156, nel Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolto a Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Gant 1st Earl of Lincolnが1126年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドで生まれた時，父Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincolnは46歳，母Maud de Penthièvreは39歳であった。約1148年にイギリスでRohese de Clareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1156年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで30歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアフォルキンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Gant 1st Earl of Lincoln(이)가 1126년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Penthièvre(은)는 39세였다. 그는 대략 1148년 영국에서 Rohese de Clare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1156년 영국 링코실르에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 폴킨그함에 묻혔다.

mn.Priory, Bridlington, Yorkshire, England: Bridlington, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.East Riding, Yorkshire, England: Cleveland, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Gant 1st Earl of Lincoln nasceu em 1126, em Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Penthièvre, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Rohese de Clare aproximadamente 1148, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1156, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 30 anos, e foi sepultado em Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert de Gant 1st Earl of Lincoln родился в 1126 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Penthièvre, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Rohese de Clare около 1148 г. в местности Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1156 г. в местности линколншир, Англия в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности фолкингхам, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gilbert de Gant 1st Earl of Lincoln nació en 1126, en Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Walter De Gaunt Earl of Lincoln, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Maud de Penthièvre, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Rohese de Clare aproximadamente 1148, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1156, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultado en Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
